title: Explainable Category Discovery
summary: Developing a framework for explainable category discovery in deep learning models, enabling the identification of novel categories and providing interpretable explanations for model predictions.

title: Example 2
summary: Unified waveform design that lets a single radio sense its surroundings while transmitting data, enabling smart-environment applications.
funding: Supported by Google Research Scholar Award

title: Example 3
summary: Programmable metasurfaces that reshape wireless propagation to improve coverage and energy efficiency in dense networks.

title: Example 4
summary: Distributed, low-latency inference at the network edge for real-time control of communication systems.
